title: Showcase: Tremblay Paysagement — 40-client tracker (composite)
problem: Composite case: a Quebec landscaping owner tracks 40 clients in a shared spreadsheet that her partner also edits. Visit-to-invoice latency is 3 days; 3x/month a snow-clearing job goes un-invoiced (~3000 $/yr lost). She doesn't want another app — she wants the next visit to auto-trigger a draft invoice in her inbox.
analysis: Backfill showcase from the original engagements.ts entry (Tremblay Paysagement). Labelled as a composite case (real coordination problems, not a real client) so the wall has more than the SND demo on it. Tier 2 work, ships in 3 weeks, costs ~1500 $ — exactly the price-anchor the homepage advertises.

decisions.decision: Trigger draft invoice from the visit-completion checkmark
decisions.rationale: She and her partner both close jobs from their phones on the morning run. The lowest-friction trigger is the existing checkmark she already taps — not a new button, not a new app.

decisions.decision: Ship to email, not to a portal
decisions.rationale: Same lesson as SND — the trade owner already lives in their inbox Sunday morning. Adding another tool to learn is friction.

successCriteria: Visit-to-invoice latency under 4 hours. Forgotten invoice rate to zero over a 30-day pilot.
knownLimitations: No payment processing in scope — Marie keeps her existing e-Transfer flow.
Shared spreadsheet stays as the visit log; tool reads it rather than replacing it.
userGuide: Composite case — no live URL. The showcase wall card links to this feature.json's revision log.

annotations.author: marc+claude
annotations.body: [exemple composite] Public showcase metadata, surfaced on the homepage wall and at /showcase/<slug>.

title.fr: Tremblay Paysagement — visite → facture, sans app de plus
title.en: Tremblay Landscaping — visit → invoice, no extra app

summary.fr: 40 clients suivis dans un Excel partagé. Trois oublis de facturation par mois (≈ 3000 $/an perdus). On déclenche le brouillon de facture depuis le coche "visite faite" qu'elle utilise déjà.
summary.en: 40 clients tracked in a shared Excel. Three missed invoices a month (~3000 $/yr lost). Draft invoice fires from the existing 'visit done' checkmark she already taps.

compositeDisclosure.fr: [exemple composite] Voix-cliente composée à partir de problèmes de coordination réels. Le scope, le prix et les décisions reflètent un vrai engagement Tier 2.
compositeDisclosure.en: [composite example] Client voice composed from real coordination problems. Scope, price, and decisions reflect a real Tier 2 engagement.

label.fr: Plan figé : trigger sur la coche, pas de portail client
label.en: Plan locked: checkmark trigger, no client portal
